items.content:
# Get real-time web data for your AI
Apify Actors scrape up-to-date web data from any website for AI apps and agents, social media monitoring, competitive intelligence, lead generation, and product research.
Try it now
Trusted by global technology leaders
## Not just a web scraping API
##  Easily integrate
ZapierGitHubGoogle SheetsPineconeany appAirbyteMCP clientsGoogle DriveSlackZapier
with Actors
## Build and deploy reliable scrapers
Open-source tools
Proxies
Unblocking
Cloud deployment
Monitoring
Data processing
### We love open source
Apify works great with both Python and JavaScript, as well as Playwright, Puppeteer, Selenium, Scrapy, and Crawlee - our own web crawling and browser automation library.
JavaScript
Python
```

1import { PuppeteerCrawler, Dataset } from "crawlee";

2

3const crawler = new PuppeteerCrawler({

4  async requestHandler({ request, page, enqueueLinks }) {

5    await Dataset.pushData({

6      url: request.url,

7      title: await page.title(),

8    });

9    await enqueueLinks();

10  },

11});

12

13await crawler.run(["https://crawlee.dev"]);

```

## Learn.
## Code.
## Connect.
## Publish Actors. Get paid.
### Reach thousands of new customers
Building and running a SaaS is hard. Building an Actor and selling it on Apify Store is 10x easier. Get users from day one.
#### No upfront costs
Publishing your Actor is free of charge—the customers pay for the computing resources. New creators get $500 free platform credits.
#### Rely on Apify infra
Actors scale automatically as you gain new users. You don’t need to worry about compute, storage, proxies, or authentication.
#### Billing is on us
Handling payments, taxes, and invoicing is a painful part of running a SaaS. Apify does all that and sends you a net payout every month.
## Enterprise-grade solution
Secure and reliable web data extraction provider for any scale.
99.95% uptime. SOC2, GDPR, and CCPA compliant.
## Apify Professional Services
Our experienced team can help you design, implement, and successfully execute your web scraping project.
## It's time to run your first Actor.
Product

Developers

Consulting

Support

Spotlight

Company

Socials

Security

Reviews

Cookies

items.content:
Search Apify Docs...
# Apify Documentation
Learn how to put the web to work with Apify.
## Getting started
Apify is all about Actors—a new way to package your code to make it easy to share, integrate, and build upon.
### [What is an Actor](https://docs.apify.com/platform/actors)### [Run an existing Actor](https://docs.apify.com/platform/actors/running)### [Develop your own Actor](https://docs.apify.com/platform/actors/development)### [Publish and monetize your Actor](https://docs.apify.com/platform/actors/publishing)
## Platform
The full reference of the Apify platform.
#### [Actors Develop, run, and share web scraping and automation tools in the cloud. ](https://docs.apify.com/platform/actors)#### [Storage Store files and results of your web scraping jobs, and export it to various formats. ](https://docs.apify.com/platform/storage)#### [Proxy Avoid blocking by smartly rotating datacenter and residential IP addresses. ](https://docs.apify.com/platform/proxy)#### [Schedules Automatically start Actors and saved tasks at specific times. ](https://docs.apify.com/platform/schedules)#### [Integrations Connect Actors with your favorite web apps and cloud services. ](https://docs.apify.com/platform/integrations)#### [Monitoring Check the performance of your Actors, validate data quality, and receive alerts. ](https://docs.apify.com/platform/monitoring)#### [Collaboration Share Actors with other people, manage your organizations and permissions. ](https://docs.apify.com/platform/collaboration)#### [Security Learn about Apify platform security and data protection. ](https://docs.apify.com/platform/security)#### [MCP Discover and use Actors with AI agents and LLMs via Apify MCP server. ](https://docs.apify.com/platform/integrations/mcp)
### Apify API
Interact with the Apify platform from your applications.

### Apify SDK
Software toolkits for developing new Actors.

### Apify CLI
Control the Apify platform from terminal or shell scripts.

## Apify Academy
Free practical courses on web scraping and the Apify platform. Go from beginner to expert, all in one place.
#### [Web scraping for beginners Learn the basics of web scraping and how to develop your own scraper. ](https://docs.apify.com/academy/scraping-basics-javascript)#### [Introduction to the Apify platform Learn the basics of the Apify platform and how to use it for your scraping projects. ](https://docs.apify.com/academy/apify-platform)#### [API scraping Learn how to efficiently extract data from web pages' APIs. ](https://docs.apify.com/academy/api-scraping)#### [Anti-scraping protections Understand the various anti-scraping measures and how to avoid them. ](https://docs.apify.com/academy/anti-scraping)#### [Advanced web scraping Learn how to extract data from more complicated websites. ](https://docs.apify.com/academy/advanced-web-scraping)#### [Deploying your code to Apify Learn how to easily move your existing projects to the Apify platform. ](https://docs.apify.com/academy/deploying-your-code)
## Open-source tools
#### [Crawlee](https://crawlee.dev)
Web crawling, scraping, and browser automation library for Node.js and Python with autoscaling and proxies.
#### [Fingerprint Suite](https://github.com/apify/fingerprint-suite)
Toolkit for generating and injecting realistic browser fingerprints into Playwright and Puppeteer.
#### [impit](https://github.com/apify/impit)
Rust-based HTTP client with browser impersonation. Bindings for Node.js, Python, and CLI.
#### [mcpc](https://github.com/apify/mcp-cli)
CLI client for the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for server exploration, scripting, and code mode.
#### [proxy-chain](https://github.com/apify/proxy-chain)
Node.js proxy server with SSL, authentication, and upstream proxy chaining.
#### [Actor whitepaper](https://whitepaper.actor)
Open specification for Actors, the serverless microapps at the core of the Apify platform.
## Actor templates
Create new web scraping projects using ready-made templates for various programming languages and scraping libraries.
Loading Actor templates ...
## Community & Help
## More reading
#### [Blog Company and product updates, tips and stories from the world of web scraping. ](https://blog.apify.com/)#### [Changelog See what's new on the Apify platform. ](https://apify.com/change-log)
## Monetize your code
Publish your Actors on Apify Store and earn regular passive income.
Learn

API

SDK

Other

More

##  [State of web scraping report 2026](https://blog.apify.com/web-scraping-report-2026/)
We asked hundreds of web scraping professionals about proxy usage, infrastructure, bot detection, and AI-driven scraping to find out where the web scraping industry is headed. Some answers surprised us.
Jan 29, 2026
##  [Introducing mcpc: A universal CLI client for MCP](https://blog.apify.com/introducing-mcpc-universal-mcp-cli-client/)
Configure MCP servers once and reuse them across AI coding agents. Reduce token usage with dynamic discovery and code mode, with full OAuth 2.1, persistent sessions, and proxy sandboxing built in.
